author: YourName
install_msg: Thanks for installing SaiCasino! Use [p]blackjack to play. Bet your Red credits!
name: SaiCasino
short: Play blackjack with Red bank credits
description: A Red Discord bot cog for playing blackjack in a single message with button interactions. Bet and win Red bank credits!
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any persistent user data beyond temporary game states which are discarded after game completion.
